Source URL: https://www.score.org/success-stories/

# SCORE Success Stories Use as Examples

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, success-stories, examples, motivation

## Resource purpose
SCORE success stories page that can provide examples of how entrepreneurs used mentoring and resources.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use for motivation, examples, or pattern recognition, not as proof that a specific user will achieve the same outcome.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages.

## Best audience
Entrepreneurs who want examples of SCORE client outcomes or need encouragement.

## Route the user here when
The user asks whether SCORE helps real businesses, wants examples, or needs reassurance about mentorship value.

## Do not over-route here when
Do not use success stories as a guarantee of results, funding approval, certification, revenue, or business viability.

## BOSS routing notes
- Use success stories lightly; BOSS should still diagnose the client’s current stage and route to next action.
- Stories can be helpful for an overwhelmed client, but should not replace practical intake and routing.

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
